violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bathroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC replaced during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking hand washing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

Cheese and meat/cheese sticks/snacks were observed held between 50-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the open case refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler milk racks have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
Outside dumpster area observed with trash, leaf litter, and/or other debris. Refuse areas must be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The following was observed in poor repair: - ceiling in bathroom area (missing tiles) - wall in bathroom (hole/missing wall) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

The walk-in cooler fan cover has an accumulation of soil residue and and white fuzz. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (Milk) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
(Beverages were) were observed stored on the floor in the (retail area and walk in cooler). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in cooler food storage shelves and fans have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
Outside dumpster area observed with trash, litter, and/or other debris. Refuse areas must be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024
